zh.Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, F: 法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wouter I de Chatillon於1050年出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內時，他的父親Guy I DE CHATILLON31歲，母親Emmergarde VAN CHOISY37歲。他和Mathilde VAN LEUVEN至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1089年享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wouter I de Chatillon于1050年出生在法国德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內时，他的父亲Guy I DE CHATILLON31岁，母亲Emmergarde VAN CHOISY37岁。他和Mathilde VAN LEUVEN至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1089年享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wouter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Wouter I de Chatillon was born in 1050, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Guy I DE CHATILLON, was 31 and his mother, Emmergarde VAN CHOISY, was 37. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Mathilde VAN LEUVEN. He died in 1089, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wouter I de Chatillon est né en 1050, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Guy I DE CHATILLON, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Emmergarde VAN CHOISY, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Mathilde VAN LEUVEN. Il est décédé en 1089, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wouter I de Chatillon 1050 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy I DE CHATILLON 31 und seine Mutter Emmergarde VAN CHOISY 37. Er hatte mit Mathilde VAN LEUVEN mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1089 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wouter I de Chatillon è nato il nel 1050 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Guy I DE CHATILLON, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Emmergarde VAN CHOISY, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Mathilde VAN LEUVEN. Morì nel 1089, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wouter I de Chatillonが1050年にフランスグランド エストマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Guy I DE CHATILLONは31歳，母Emmergarde VAN CHOISYは37歳であった。彼はMathilde VAN LEUVENとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1089年に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wouter I de Chatillon(이)가 1050년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy I DE CHATILLON(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Emmergarde VAN CHOISY(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Mathilde VAN LEUVEN(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1089년 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wouter I de Chatillon nasceu em 1050, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Guy I DE CHATILLON, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Emmergarde VAN CHOISY, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Mathilde VAN LEUVEN. Ele faleceu em 1089, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wouter I de Chatillon родился в 1050 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy I DE CHATILLON было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Emmergarde VAN CHOISY, 37. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Mathilde VAN LEUVEN. Он умер в 1089 г. в возрасте 39 лет.

sm.1089 to 1096: mai le 1089 e o'o I le 1096

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wouter I de Chatillon nació en 1050, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Guy I DE CHATILLON, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Emmergarde VAN CHOISY, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Mathilde VAN LEUVEN. Murió en 1089, a la edad de 39 años.
